title.en: I'm here for you! 내가 네 곁에 있을게!
title.ko: 내가 네 곁에 있을게! 언제든 의지해도 돼!

description.en: When you want to be a strong support for a friend going through a hard time! Practice giving sincere support with 내가 네 곁에 있을게 and 언제든 의지해도 돼.
description.ko: 친구가 힘든 시간을 보낼 때 든든한 버팀목이 되어주고 싶다면! 내가 네 곁에 있을게와 언제든 의지해도 돼를 사용해 진심 어린 응원을 보내 봅니다.

tags: Reaction. Support. Friendship. Comfort. Encouragement. Daily Life

content.speaker: John
content.text: What's up world! Welcome back. You are listening to... "Real Reaction!" I'm your host. John.

content.speaker: Mina
content.text: 존. 요즘 일이 갑자기 몰려서 그런지 마음이 좀 허전하고 지치네요.
content.translation: John. maybe because work has piled up lately. I feel a bit empty and exhausted.

content.speaker: Mina
content.text: 잘하고 있는 건지도 모르겠고요.
content.translation: I don't even know if I'm doing well.

content.speaker: John
content.text: Mina. you're doing a great job!

content.speaker: John
content.text: 제가 미나 곁에 있을게요. If things get too hard. we can always talk.

content.speaker: Mina
content.text: 고마워요. 존. 그런 말을 들으니까 마음이 한결 가벼워지는 것 같아요.
content.translation: Thank you. John. Hearing that makes my heart feel much lighter.

content.speaker: John
content.text: Of course! 언제든 의지해도 돼. We are a team. right?
content.translation: Of course! You can lean on me anytime. We are a team. right?

content.speaker: John
content.text: 내가 네 곁에 있을게. This is such a comforting phrase to hear.

content.speaker: Mina
content.text: 네. 상대방이 혼자가 아니라는 걸 알려주고 싶을 때 쓰는 말이에요.
content.translation: Yes. It's what you say when you want someone to know they aren't alone.

content.speaker: Mina
content.text: 물리적인 거리보다 정서적으로 함께하고 있다는 든든함을 주는 표현이죠.
content.translation: It's an expression that gives a sense of security that you're together emotionally rather than just physically.

content.speaker: John
content.text: 내가 네 곁에 있을게.
content.translation: I'm here for you.

content.speaker: Mina
content.text: 그리고 언제든 의지해도 돼 라는 말은 상대방이 힘들 때 나에게 도움을 청하거나 기대도 좋다는 허락과 지지의 의미가 담겨 있어요.
content.translation: And the phrase 'Eon-je-deun ui-ji-hae-do dwae' carries the meaning of permission and support. saying it's okay to ask for help or lean on me when things are hard.

content.speaker: John
content.text: 언제든 의지해도 돼.
content.translation: You can lean on me anytime.

content.speaker: John
content.text: What if I want to say "Cheer up" or "Hang in there".

content.speaker: Mina
content.text: 그럴 땐 힘내 라고 말해 보세요.
content.translation: In that case. try saying 'Him-nae'.

content.speaker: Mina
content.text: 한국 사람들이 응원할 때 가장 많이 쓰는 짧고 강력한 한마디예요.
content.translation: It's the most common. short. and powerful word Koreans use when cheering someone on.

content.speaker: John
content.text: Okay. let's try a situation. Imagine I'm feeling very overwhelmed because I have a big presentation tomorrow and I'm nervous.

content.speaker: Mina
content.text: 존. 내일 발표 때문에 걱정 많이 돼요? 얼굴이 평소보다 긴장돼 보여요.
content.translation: John. are you worried about the presentation tomorrow? You look more nervous than usual.

content.speaker: John
content.text: Yeah. I'm afraid I'll make a mistake. I've been practicing all night but I'm still shaky.

content.speaker: Mina
content.text: 너무 부담 갖지 마요. 존은 충분히 잘할 수 있어요!
content.translation: Don't feel too pressured. You can definitely do well!

content.speaker: Mina
content.text: 제가 응원하고 있을게요. 제가 존 곁에 있을게요!
content.translation: I'll be cheering for you. I'm here for you.

content.speaker: John
content.text: Thanks. Mina. That really helps.

content.speaker: Mina
content.text: 도움이 필요하면 언제든 말해요. 언제든 의지해도 돼.
content.translation: Tell me anytime if you need help. You can lean on me anytime.

content.speaker: Mina
content.text: 오늘 푹 자고 나면 내일은 더 잘할 수 있을 거예요. 힘내요!
content.translation: After a good sleep today. you'll be able to do better tomorrow. Cheer up!

content.speaker: John
content.text: Thank you! I feel much better now.

content.speaker: John
content.text: Knowing someone is on your side can change everything.

content.speaker: Mina
content.text: 맞아요. 진심이 담긴 리액션 하나가 누군가에게는 다시 일어날 수 있는 큰 힘이 된답니다.
content.translation: Right. A single sincere reaction can be a great strength for someone to stand up again.

content.speaker: Mina
content.text: 오늘 배운 따뜻한 표현들을 주변에 전해 보세요.
content.translation: Try sharing the warm expressions we learned today with those around you.

content.speaker: John
content.text: Let's review our "supportive" reactions.

content.speaker: John
content.text: 내가 네 곁에 있을게!
content.translation: I'm here for you!

content.speaker: John
content.text: 언제든 의지해도 돼!
content.translation: You can lean on me anytime!

content.speaker: John
content.text: 힘내!
content.translation: Cheer up!

content.speaker: John
content.text: 내가 있잖아!
content.translation: You have me!

content.speaker: John
content.text: 넌 혼자가 아니야!
content.translation: You are not alone!

content.speaker: Mina
content.text: 여러분도 오늘 누군가에게 든든한 편이 되어주는 따스한 하루 보내시길 바랄게요.
content.translation: I hope you all have a warm day being a reliable supporter for someone today.

content.speaker: John
content.text: That's all for today. See you in the next episode.

content.speaker: Mina
content.text: 다음에 또 만나요. 안녕~!
content.translation: See you again next time. Bye~!

vocabulary.example: 힘들 때는 친구에게 의지해도 괜찮아요. (It's okay to lean on a friend when things are hard.)
항상 네 곁에 있을게. (I'll always be by your side.)
가족들의 응원이 큰 힘이 되었어요. (The support of my family was a great strength.)
발표를 앞두고 너무 긴장돼요. (I'm so nervous ahead of the presentation.)
너무 부담 갖지 말고 편하게 하세요. (Don't feel too pressured and take it easy.)
우리는 정서적으로 매우 가까운 사이예요. (We are very close emotionally.)
